description_long: This is a low-top casual sneaker featuring a vibrant, multicolored patterned fabric upper with a mix of zigzag, wave, and geometric motifs in red, blue, black, and cream. The shoe has a rounded toe and is equipped with dark red laces threaded through five pairs of eyelets. The interior lining appears to be a soft, light blue-gray material, providing comfort for the wearer. The sole is flat, white, and appears to be made of rubber, offering flexibility and grip for urban walking. The overall design is eye-catching and artistic, suitable for casual wear in city environments. There are no visible logos or brand markings on the exterior.
description: A colorful, patterned low-top sneaker with red laces and a white rubber sole, designed for casual urban wear. The shoe features a mix of geometric and wave motifs in red, blue, black, and cream.
description_view_0: Front view shows the rounded toe, red laces, and the central zigzag pattern on the upper.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the intricate multicolored patterns and the full length of the red laces.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the heel with a wavy red and black pattern and the back collar of the shoe.
description_view_3: Right side view reveals the geometric motifs and the overall shape of the sneaker.
